title: rosa viscaria var. minuscula
intro: Rosa viscaria var. minuscula, also known as Dwarf Alpenrose or Alpine Rose, is a small, woody shrub native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for treating digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rosa viscaria var. minuscula include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antioxidant properties. Rosa viscaria var. minuscula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, as well as being used in traditional folk medicine, although it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
